flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 30% at Keuka College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (920 vs 1.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Keuka College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.0k → $39.3k).
